finding_results.notes: Replaced the recap-heavy post-Miren coda with a brief aftermath sequence, kept cosmology to one short paragraph, and ended on Gavin's concrete return to the page.
Added immediate aftermath pressure that reaches Gavin in the sub-collection, then staged the sensory threshold at the Great Hall before he turns back.
Added a direct aftermath encounter in the ruined corridor and Great Hall threshold, including visible triage damage, a body under a sheet, and Duncan carrying water.

Varied Miren's entrance and later observation beats to remove the repeated 'She looked like' scaffold, kept only one 'She looked older than fifteen' construction, and shifted the ward-decay wording so the exact 'thinner than' phrasing lands once in the closing image.
finding_results.summary: Repeated descriptive scaffolds were broken up and the ward-thinning refrain was consolidated into the final image.

pass_summaries.summary: Tightened the closing movement, staged a direct Great Hall aftermath threshold scene, and returned the chapter to Gavin bleeding onto the manuscript and continuing the work.
